# Buoys

Buoys are point-mass objects used to model in-line buoyancy elements.

## Buoy Types

- Spar buoys
- Clump weights
- Towed fish

## Properties

| Property | Units | Description |
|---|---|---|
| Mass | te | Mass including contents |
| Volume | m³ | Displaced volume |
| Drag area | m² | Projected drag area |

### Buoyancy Calculation

Buoyancy force equals displaced volume times seawater density times gravity.
